productDisplayName: Puma Men Polo Striped Jersey Red Tshirt
description: Composition Red and black striped polo shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar, short sleeves with ribbing made of 98% cotton and 2% elastane, brand badge with button on the left cuff, buttoned chest placket and embroidered brand logo on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with luke warm water Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Lightweight with a soft collar and buttons at the neck opening, this T-shirt from puma is stylish, and yet relaxed. The striped polo tee gives you a stunning apperance, a little smarter than a regular tee. Perfect worn with jeans, this tee also works great with shorts and track pants. Model statistics Model is a size M of height 6',chest 39" and shoulders 18"
